tagline: The Most Complete Pool Service in Fresno & Clovis

hero.headline: 28 Years of Pools Done The Family Way
hero.subheadline: Fresno families have trusted the Lopes family since 1996 to keep their pools pristine. CPO-certified technicians, honest pricing, and service we stake our family name on — so you never worry about your pool again.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> a Family That Cares
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green pool recovery, Pristine Pool Service handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can enjoy your backyard oasis worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly Residential Service
cards.description: Tiered maintenance plans tailored to your needs — chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, filter cleaning, and equipment checks to keep your pool sparkling every week.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, sweeps, and chlorinators. Our CAEI-certified technicians fix it right the first time — most repairs same-visit.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Algae took over? We specialize in bringing neglected, murky green pools back to crystal-clear, swimmable condition — fast.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Reliable maintenance for apartment complexes, HOAs, hotels, and fitness centers. CPO-certified techs ensure full compliance with health and safety standards.

cards.title: Energy-Efficient Upgrades
cards.description: PG&E-certified installation of energy-efficient pool pumps and equipment. Save money on your electric bill while keeping your pool running at peak performance.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of new pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. CAEI-certified installers ensure every component runs optimally from day one.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We will provide an honest, no-pressure quote and schedule your free inspection at a time that works for you.

steps.title: Meet Your Dedicated Technician
steps.description: A CPO-certified tech from our team inspects your pool, explains everything clearly, and begins service — on time, every time. No strangers, no revolving door.

steps.title: Enjoy a Pristine Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, properly balanced, and swim-ready year-round. We stake our family reputation on every single visit — and it shows.

about.label: Why Fresno Trusts the Lopes Family
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1996 — Your Pool Is Our Reputation
about.description: When Joe Lopes founded Pristine Pool Service in 1996, he built it on a simple promise: treat every pool like it is your own. Today, Joe, his wife Kristi, son Brandon, and a team of experienced technicians with over 50 combined years of expertise continue that tradition. We are not a franchise or a faceless corporation — we are your neighbors in Fresno, and we put our family name on every service call.

features.title: CPO-Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team holds a Certified Pool/Spa Operator credential from the National Swimming Pool Foundation — your pool is in expert hands.

features.title: A+ BBB & ThreeBestRated
features.description: Our A+ BBB rating and ThreeBestRated score of 116/120 are not just badges — they are proof of thousands of satisfied pool owners across Fresno and Clovis.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and make it right at no extra charge. Our family reputation depends on your complete satisfaction.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service tier that fits your pool and budget. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — we earn your trust every visit.

guarantee.headline: Our "Pristine Pool" Family Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right — at no extra cost. Joe and the entire Lopes family stake their reputation on every pool we touch. We do not consider the job done until your pool is pristine and you are smiling.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Fresno and Clovis are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority response. Just call us at (559) 456-4011 and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every technician is CPO-certified through the National Swimming Pool Foundation and our installers hold CAEI certification in partnership with PG&E. We are also a licensed, bonded, and insured California contractor (License #972904).

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Fresno clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will know exactly what was done after each visit.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for apartment complexes, HOAs, hotels, and fitness centers throughout Fresno, Clovis, and the Central Valley. Our CPO-certified team ensures full health and safety compliance.

faqs.question: Can you help me save on energy costs?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are CAEI-certified and PG&E-approved to install energy-efficient pool pumps. Many of our Fresno clients see significant savings on their electric bills after upgrading their pool equipment through our certified programs.

testimonials.name: Verified Reviewer
testimonials.text: This company does a very good job on keeping my pool sparkling. My tech is very thorough with cleaning and equipment maintenance. I definitely recommend this company if you want the best in the area.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Client
testimonials.text: Amazing service and great customer care. I called Kristi from a referral that I received from a friend. They are super busy, but they do provide a great service.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Customer
testimonials.text: Best pool service I have ever had. Joe, Kristi and their staff are very friendly and polite. Their work is thorough and professional and I never have to worry about the quality of their work.
